GTM decision: the offer is Route orchestration software. The market is Enterprise logistics.

For the US motion, geographies include United States and Canada. We will prioritize industries include Third-party logistics and Retail; company size is 1000+.

Buying roles: titles include Director of Transportation and VP Logistics. Functions include Supply Chain and Operations; seniorities are VP and Director.

Demand capture will use search terms include last mile logistics and route optimization. The problems are high cost-to-serve and manual dispatch exceptions; triggers include mixed fleet complexity and SLA pressure.

The campaign goal is Pipeline creation. Preferred channels include google-ads-youtube, linkedin-ads, and microsoft-ads.
